creator: kbyanc@posi.net
text:
Documentation for the kernel functions:
		tvtohz
		microtime
		nanotime
		getmicrotime
		getnanotime
		microuptime
		nanouptime
		getmicrouptime
		getnanouptime

	-Kelly

	Here are some man pages for review
	oh, and look, not one but two!
	Alas, just one poem for you to read
	But it's so good, that's all you need! :)

Fix: Attached is a diff taken from /usr/src which includes the 2 man pages
	the necessary Makefile changes.
